recipes.title: Garden Salad
recipes.description: Fresh greens topped with vinaigrette and seasonal vegetables.
recipes.instructions: Wash and dry all vegetables. Toss greens with tomatoes, cucumber, and onion. Drizzle with vinaigrette and serve immediately.

recipes.title: Spiced Lamb Tacos
recipes.description: Tender pulled lamb seasoned with cumin and chili, served in warm tortillas with pickled onions.
recipes.instructions: Season lamb with cumin and chili. Slow cook for 4 hours until tender. Shred and serve in warm tortillas with pickled onions.

recipes.title: Breakfast Casserole
recipes.description: A hearty bake featuring farm-fresh eggs, savory sausage, and melted cheddar cheese.
recipes.instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Cook sausage and vegetables. Whisk eggs and combine all ingredients. Bake for 35 minutes until golden.

recipes.title: Chicken Wontons
recipes.description: Hand-folded dumplings filled with minced chicken and ginger, served with a soy dipping sauce.
recipes.instructions: Mix chicken with ginger, garlic and sesame oil. Place filling in wonton wrappers and fold. Boil for 5 minutes and serve with soy sauce.

recipes.title: Creamy Garlic Chicken
recipes.description: Pan-seared chicken breasts smothered in a rich, velvety garlic and parmesan cream sauce.
recipes.instructions: Sear chicken in butter until golden. Remove and sauté garlic. Add cream and parmesan, simmer until thick. Return chicken and coat in sauce.

recipes.title: Chicken Biryani
recipes.description: A flavorful Indian rice dish with aromatic spices.
recipes.instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices. Layer with parboiled rice. Cook on dum (slow steam) for 30 minutes until fragrant.
